subject: iPhone screen rotation locked — grayed out in Control Center
description: Screen stays in portrait even when user rotates phone sideways; rotation lock icon may or may not appear in status bar.

ts_steps.title: Control Center
ts_steps.action: Open CC from correct gesture for model.

ts_steps.title: Home Screen rotate test
ts_steps.action: Note many iPhones do not rotate Home — expected.

ts_steps.title: Safari rotate
ts_steps.action: Landscape should work if lock off.

ts_steps.title: Display Zoom
ts_steps.action: Settings → Display → Display Zoom — try Standard vs Zoomed.

ts_steps.title: Hardware service
ts_steps.action: If no software cause — accelerometer/gyro fault.

internal_information: Zoomed display, app no-landscape, lock confusion, sensor fault.
